resources.string: Nayti finds photos by text, meaning, and visual content — even when you remember a single detail.
The app has no internet access. Photos, recognized text, models, and queries stay on your phone.
Three steps to your first search
Choose a signed offline model pack.
Checking the signature, files, and neural runtime.
The pack was rejected without changing working data. You can choose another file.
Android lets you share the full library or selected photos only.
Nayti sees only the library allowed by Android.
Starts only after you grant access.
Counting available photos without starting heavy models.
Access is granted, but the current selection has no photos yet.

plurals.name: setup_prepare_pending
plurals.item: %1$d photo is available. Preparation starts only when you ask.
%1$d photos are available. Preparation starts only when you ask.

resources.string: Ready %1$d of %2$d. You can stop safely and resume later.
You can return from the Readiness and Data tabs. Nothing starts in the background without your action.
Text in photos, identifiers, names, and documents — locally, without the cloud.
The catalog is connected. Search covers only photos already processed.
Connect your library on the Readiness tab first.
Import a signed model pack on the Data tab.
The search could not finish. Try the query again; prepared data remains intact.
Meaning-based search is still being prepared; these results match the text.
Photo-content search is still being prepared; results use the available text signals.
Some search modes are still being prepared. Try an exact phrase or repeat the query when preparation finishes.
Rephrase the query or try another detail: a place, visible text, an object, a name, or a number.
Your library is not connected yet
Nayti will request access to photos only and show what is already searchable.
See how many photos are ready in each search channel.
Preparation stopped safely. You can resume it.
The phone is too warm, so preparation is paused. It can continue after the device cools down.
Android requested more memory. Preparation stopped without losing progress.
There is not enough free space to prepare safely. Free some space and resume.
Battery Saver paused preparation. Turn it off or continue later.
Low battery paused preparation. Connect power or continue later.
Readiness for each search mode appears here after you choose a model pack.
Exact phrases, names, identifiers, and visible writing.
Documents and notes by meaning, without requiring the same words.
Objects, scenes, and descriptions of what appears in a photo.
Exact copies and visually close versions of the same shot.
Android opens the system picker first. You can share the full library or selected photos only.
Nayti sees only the current system selection. Other records stay hidden and are not treated as deleted.
The catalog is reconciled with MediaStore. Android remains in control of the originals.
Library reconciliation stopped safely. You can retry.
Only photos that can be opened safely with the current permission.
Selection limits, offline media, or changes that are not confirmed yet.
The first verified catalog records appear here after access is granted.
Recognized text regions are highlighted when OCR is already available.
The stale card was hidden immediately. Return to the library after reconciliation finishes.
The photo could not be opened. Android access may have changed, or the file may be temporarily unavailable.
The image opens locally at a bounded size and is released when this screen closes.
This photo is not ready for similarity search yet. Continue preparing the library.
No similar frames were found among the photos processed so far.
Similar-photo search could not finish. Try again.
This photo is not ready for duplicate search yet.
No copies or near-identical frames were found.
Duplicate search could not finish. Try again.
Manage the local index, model pack, and diagnostics without hidden sync.
The app has no INTERNET permission. Photos, OCR text, and queries stay on the device.
Search index: %1$s · active models: %2$s. Original photos are not copied.
Removes OCR, embeddings, and search bookkeeping. The photo catalog and installed model pack are preserved.
Stopping preparation and safely removing derived data…
The index was removed. Prepare the photos again before searching.
The reset did not fully finish. Search was disabled safely; retry to remove remaining files.
OCR, embeddings, and preparation progress will be permanently removed. Photos and the model pack remain.
Exports versions, states, and counts only. Filenames, OCR text, thumbnails, and queries are excluded.
The report could not be written to the selected file. You can retry.
Nayti follows the current MediaStore selection and keeps derived data locally. Changing the Android selection updates the search scope immediately.
No hidden photos currently have preserved derived data.

plurals.name: quarantine_count
plurals.item: %1$d photo is hidden by the current system selection. It is excluded from search; removing its derived data immediately requires resetting the full index.
%1$d photos are hidden by the current system selection. They are excluded from search; removing their derived data immediately requires resetting the full index.

resources.string: Not installed. A signed offline pack will be imported separately from the APK.
Checking the signature, files, and seven neural graphs. Keep the app open.
The pack did not pass verification. Working data is unchanged; choose a compatible signed file.
The pack did not pass verification. Continuing with verified version %1$s.
Version %1$s is verified and is being prepared alongside the active version. Search switches only after full verification.
Checking whether a previous working version is preserved.
A previous active version will appear here after the first verified update.
Version %1$s is active. Verified version %2$s is preserved for an atomic rollback.
Verifying version %1$s files and switching search…
Rollback finished. Version %1$s is active; no earlier version is preserved.
Rollback finished: version %1$s is active. Earlier version %2$s is still available if needed.
The previous version could not be verified. Search stayed on working version %1$s.
Nayti %1$s · an independent greenfield implementation under Apache-2.0. Model licenses and provenance are included in every signed model pack.
Nayti is preparing photos for search
